title: Erroring Entity Remover
description: Removes entities that throw errors and crash the game while ticking.
body:
This mod removes entities that throw errors and crash the game while ticking. Warning: Use at your own risk. This should generally be used as a last resort, and if the crash is clearly caused by a mod, you should report it so the author can fix it. [Not Enough Crashes](https://modrinth.com/mod/notenoughcrashes) is good at identifying what mods might be causing crashes, and I recommend using it first then using this if the problem continues.

 

To report issues or request new features, use the [issue tracker](https://github.com/The-Fireplace-Minecraft-Mods/Erroring-Entity-Remover/issues). Do not ask me to port to different Minecraft versions or make this available on Forge. For questions and other discussion, feel free to join my [Discord](https://discord.gg/QXQYPj5).
